creator: otacilio.neto@bsd.com.br
text:
When executing sysctl -a on a beaglebone black FreeBSD raises a kernel panic

To reproduce download the image from 
https://download.freebsd.org/ftp/releases/arm/armv6/ISO-IMAGES/11.1/FreeBSD-11.1-RELEASE-arm-armv6-BEAGLEBONE.img.xz 

install on a SD-CARD, boot, login and type sysctla -a

FreeBSD 12 runs OK
